	Identifier	"stylus"
	Option		"Device"	"/dev/input/wacom"
	Option		"Type"		"stylus"
	Option		"ForceDevice"	"ISDV4"		# Tablet PC ONLY
EndSection

	Driver		"wacom"
	Identifier	"eraser"
	Option		"Device"	"/dev/input/wacom"
	Option		"Type"		"eraser"
	Option		"ForceDevice"	"ISDV4"		# Tablet PC ONLY
EndSection

Section "InputDevice"
	Driver		"wacom"
	Identifier	"cursor"
	Option		"Device"	"/dev/input/wacom"
	Option		"Type"		"cursor"
	Option		"ForceDevice"	"ISDV4"		# Tablet PC ONLY
EndSection

Section "Device"
	Identifier	"ATI Technologies Inc R420 JP [Radeon X800XT]"
	Driver		"radeon"
    	Option 		"GARTSize" "256"
	BusID		"PCI:1:0:0"
EndSection

Section "Monitor"
	Identifier	"Generic Monitor"
	Option		"DPMS"
	HorizSync	30-70
	VertRefresh	50-160
EndSection

Section "Screen"
	Identifier	"Default Screen"
	Device		"ATI Technologies Inc R420 JP [Radeon X800XT]"
	Monitor		"Generic Monitor"
	DefaultDepth	24
EndSection

Section "ServerLayout"

	InputDevice	"Generic Keyboard"
	InputDevice	"Configured Mouse"
 

# Uncomment if you have a wacom tablet

```

I change the driver from ¨ati¨ to ¨radeon¨ but I have the same performance and need to add a option in ¨Device¨ the gartsize because all 3D application I trying to run, just hang in around 3-5 second, this setting fix my problem.

### Post by CowzRule on 2007-10-25
Here are some that I used in a machine I had with an ATI X800 Pro.
```
Option "AGPMode" "8"
Option "ColorTiling" "on"
Option "AccelMethod" "XAA"
Option "EnablePageFlip" "on"
Option "XAANoOffScreenPixMaps"
Option "RenderAccel" "true"
```
To see if those options, and the ones you already have, are doing anything, open /var/log/Xorg.0.log with gedit
```
gedit /var/log/Xorg.0.log
```
and look for any mention of the options.

Edit: Those options go in the Section "Device" area.
i.e.```
Section "Device"
	Identifier	"ATI Technologies Inc R420 JP [Radeon X800XT]"
	Driver		"radeon"
    	Option 		"GARTSize" "256"
        Option          "AGPMode" "8"
        Option          "ColorTiling" "on"
        Option          "AccelMethod" "XAA"
        Option          "EnablePageFlip" "on"
        Option          "XAANoOffScreenPixMaps"
        Option          "RenderAccel" "true"
	BusID		"PCI:1:0:0"
EndSection
```

---
